sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Gilead buys Arcellx (ACLX) for $115 per share plus $5 CVR
feed.summary: Gilead Sciences has completed its acquisition of Arcellx (ACLX) for $115 per share in cash, plus a contingent value right (CVR) of an additional $5 upon achieving a specified milestone. This transaction was finalized on April 28, 2026, with Gilead's subsidiary purchasing all outstanding Arcellx shares and merging with the company, making Arcellx a wholly owned subsidiary. As a result, major shareholder New Enterprise Associates no longer holds any beneficial ownership in Arcellx.

feed.title: Agencia Comercial Spirits (NASDAQ: AGCC) outlines whisky risks and $120M AI pivot
feed.summary: Agencia Comercial Spirits (AGCC) has filed its annual report (Form 20-F), detailing its core business in Taiwanese whisky distribution and a new strategic pivot into AI computing infrastructure, including a non-binding letter of intent for USD120M in NVIDIA B300 server leases. The report outlines significant business risks such as reliance on major whisky customers, inventory management issues, competition, and geopolitical tensions in Taiwan and Indonesia, which could affect its whisky operations and AI expansion. Despite robust revenue growth of 145% in 2025 primarily from international bottled whisky sales, net income decreased due to lower gross margins and increased operating expenses related to IPO preparations and new business evaluation.

feed.title: Adamas Trust anticipates 5 to 6 BPL rental securitizations in 2026 as Constructive turns profitable
feed.summary: The article states that Adamas Trust is projecting a significant increase in build-to-rent (BPL) rental securitizations, expecting to see 5 to 6 such deals in 2026. This forecast comes as Constructive, a key player in the sector, has reportedly achieved profitability.

feed.title: Adagio Medical (ADGM) outlines 2026 director elections and auditor vote
feed.summary: Adagio Medical Holdings, Inc. (ADGM) has detailed the agenda for its upcoming virtual 2026 annual shareholder meeting on June 16, 2026. Stockholders will vote on the re-election of two Class II directors, Orly Mishan and Sean Salmon, and the ratification of WithumSmith+Brown, PC as the independent registered public accounting firm for the fiscal year ending December 31, 2026. The proxy statement also provides compensation details for executives, including CEO Todd Usen and CFO Deborah Kaster, and outlines the company's governance practices and significant investor holdings.

feed.title: Executive pay and board elections at ACCESS Newswire (ACCS) 2026 virtual meeting
feed.summary: ACCESS Newswire (ACCS) will hold its 2026 virtual annual meeting on June 26, 2026, where stockholders will vote on the election of four directors and the ratification of Cherry Bekaert LLP as the independent auditor. The proxy statement details executive and non-employee director compensation for 2025, including CEO Brian Balbirnie's total compensation of $339,000, and outlines the company's clawback policy for erroneously awarded incentive compensation. As of April 30, 2026, the company had 3,882,143 shares outstanding, with key shareholders including Brian Balbirnie and Topline Capital Management.

feed.title: AIxCrypto explores decentralized computing for real-time AI agents
feed.summary: AIxCrypto (NASDAQ: AIXC) announced a non-binding collaboration framework with Chutes AI to explore decentralized compute infrastructure for supporting AIxC's AI agent and application-layer ecosystem. This partnership aims to evaluate the use of decentralized AI inference for tasks like model routing, real-time processing, and managing multi-agent interactions, which are crucial for scaling AI-native applications. Both companies will assess commercial and operational terms in separate agreements, emphasizing an infrastructure-first approach to AI development.

feed.title: Adamas Trust Shares Rise After Posting Better-Than-Expected Q1 Earnings
feed.summary: The Adamas Trust (ADMS) stock surged by 9.3% in pre-market trading after the company reported better-than-expected first-quarter earnings, showcasing strong financial performance. This positive market reaction indicates investor confidence in the company's recent results and future outlook. The earnings announcement likely highlighted key financial metrics that surpassed analyst expectations.

feed.title: AAON (AAON) CFO discloses 2,034 shares and stock options on Form 3
feed.summary: AAON's Chief Financial Officer, Cheung Chung Kin, has filed an initial Form 3, disclosing his equity holdings in the company. The filing indicates direct ownership of 2,034 shares of Common Stock and a stock option for 5,211 shares with an exercise price of $97.90, vesting over three years. This disclosure provides transparency into the CFO's financial alignment with AAON's performance.

feed.title: Alight (NYSE: ALIT) CTO reports zero Class A stock owned
feed.summary: Alight, Inc.'s Chief Technology Officer, Naveen Baweja, filed a Form 3 indicating he holds no direct shares of Alight Class A Common Stock as of April 29, 2026. This initial ownership report does not show any buy or sell transactions, simply fulfilling the requirement for new officers to disclose their holdings. The filing clarifies that Baweja has no direct equity stake in this particular class of stock.

feed.title: Ardagh Metal Packaging Sets June 4, 2026 AGM and Files 2025 Financials
feed.summary: Ardagh Metal Packaging (AMBP) has announced its 2026 annual general meeting for June 4, 2026, in Luxembourg, where shareholders will approve 2025 financial statements, confirm dividends, and elect directors. The company also filed a Form 6-K providing its 2025 audited financials and proxy materials. TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates AMBP as Neutral due to high leverage and fragile profitability, despite a high dividend yield and reaffirmed EBITDA guidance.

feed.title: AlTi Global (NASDAQ: ALTI) details 2026 virtual meeting, board votes, executive pay
feed.summary: AlTi Global (NASDAQ: ALTI) has announced details for its 2026 virtual annual shareholder meeting scheduled for June 17, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. ET. Stockholders will vote on the election of seven directors and the ratification of KPMG LLP as the independent registered public accounting firm for fiscal year 2026. The proxy statement also provides information on executive compensation for 2025, detailing total compensation for Michael Tiedemann, Kevin Moran, and Colleen Graham, and describes significant preferred equity investments from Allianz and Constellation, along with their associated investor rights and governance features.

feed.title: REMINDER: Aldeyra Therapeutics, Inc. Investors With Significant Losses Must Act By May 29, 2026
feed.summary: Kirby McInerney LLP reminds investors of Aldeyra Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: ALDX) about the May 29, 2026 deadline to become a lead plaintiff in a federal securities class action lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that Aldeyra failed to disclose inconsistent results from clinical trials of its drug candidate, reproxalap, leading to a significant stock price drop following a Complete Response Letter from the FDA. Investors who purchased Aldeyra securities between November 3, 2023, and March 16, 2026, are encouraged to contact the firm to discuss their rights.

feed.title: Xiao-I Corp. Secures $3.25 Million Convertible Note Financing From Institutional Investor
feed.summary: Xiao-I Corp. (AIXI) has secured a $3.25 million unsecured convertible note financing from an institutional investor, issued at a $3.0 million purchase price with 8.5 million pre-delivery shares. The 12-month note includes conversion options for the lender and allows for additional financing, indicating the company's continuous reliance on structured funding for capital needs. Spark, TipRanks' AI Analyst, rates AIXI as Underperform due to weak financial health despite strong revenue growth, with technicals also signaling a bearish outlook.

feed.title: Needham Maintains Alnylam Pharmaceuticals(ALNY.US) With Buy Rating, Maintains Target Price $510
feed.summary: Needham has reiterated its Buy rating on Alnylam Pharmaceuticals (ALNY.US) and maintained its target price of $510. This indicates a continued positive outlook from the firm regarding Alnylam's stock performance.

feed.title: Exzeo Group (NYSE:XZO) CEO Buys $32,440.00 in Stock
feed.summary: Exzeo Group CEO Paresh Patel recently purchased 2,000 shares of the company's stock for $32,440.00, increasing his total holdings to 1,634,013 shares. This latest transaction on April 29th follows several other 2,000-share purchases made throughout April. The company reported strong Q1 earnings, beating analyst expectations for both EPS and revenue, though analysts currently have a "Hold" consensus rating with an average price target of $26.00.

feed.title: Equity grant gives Allarity Therapeutics (ALLR) officer 133,333 RSUs
feed.summary: Allarity Therapeutics (ALLR) officer Jeremy R. Graff was granted 133,333 Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) on January 28, 2026, as equity compensation. These RSUs, awarded at $0.00 per share, will vest in three equal annual installments, contingent on Graff's continued employment. Following this transaction, Graff directly holds 381,644 shares of the company's common stock.

feed.title: Deep Track reports 9.99% stake in Altimmune (ALT) via warrants and shares
feed.summary: Deep Track Capital, along with its affiliates Deep Track Biotechnology Master Fund, Ltd. and Deep Track Special Opportunities Fund, LP, and David Kroin, has reported a 9.99% beneficial ownership stake in Altimmune (ALT). This stake, amounting to 19,417,221 shares, includes common stock, pre-funded warrants, and warrants, all subject to a 9.99% maximum exercise limitation. The disclosure was made via a Schedule 13G filing as of April 30, 2026 and is based on 194,366,579 shares outstanding.

feed.title: $1000 Invested In Global X Artificial Intelligence & Technology ETF 10 Years Ago Would Be Worth This Much Today

The ETF has outperformed the market by 9.65% annually over the last decade. This highlights the significant impact of compounded returns over time.

feed.title: reAlpha (NASDAQ: AIRE) Announces AiChat Launch of Shopify Conversational Commerce Integration and AI Ticketing for eCommerce
feed.summary: reAlpha Tech Corp. (NASDAQ: AIRE) announced that its subsidiary, AiChat Pte. Ltd., has launched conversational commerce and AI ticketing capabilities for eCommerce brands. This new platform integrates directly with Shopify, enabling businesses to manage the entire customer journey—from product discovery and transactions to post-purchase support—within a single conversational interface. The solution aims to enhance customer engagement and operational efficiency by allowing in-chat purchasing and AI-powered customer service, supporting a shift towards interaction-driven commerce models.

feed.title: Executive pay, board changes detailed in Expion360 (NASDAQ: XPON) 2025 10-K/A
feed.summary: Expion360 Inc. (NASDAQ: XPON) has filed an amended annual report (10-K/A) for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2025, to provide detailed information on corporate governance, executive compensation, director remuneration, and ownership data, which was previously omitted. The report highlights the appointment of Joseph Hammer as CEO and Chairman in October 2025 with a base salary of $330,000, changes in executive roles, and significant compensation packages for former executives. It also outlines the company's equity incentive plans and a new compensation policy for non-employee directors for 2026.

(NYSE: ZIM) reported the results of a special shareholders' meeting held on April 30, 2026, where shareholders approved two retention bonus proposals for 13 office holders and the CEO, along with another proposal. However, a third proposal concerning compensation policy was not approved. The meeting had 48.84% of outstanding shares represented, meeting quorum requirements.

feed.title: Fair Isaac Corporation (FICO) Stock Trades Down, Here Is Why
feed.summary: Fair Isaac Corporation (FICO) shares dropped 4.8% after prominent investor Steve Eisman disclosed a short position, overshadowing a strong earnings report and raised guidance. While the company exceeded Wall Street expectations for Q2 revenue and earnings, valuation concerns from analysts and Eisman's short position contributed to the stock's decline. Despite the positive financial performance, the market reacted negatively to the investor action and analyst caution.

feed.title: New DG store opens in Los Fresnos
feed.summary: A new Dollar General store is opening in Los Fresnos, Texas, at 31280 State Hwy. 100, providing convenient access to household essentials. The grand opening is scheduled for Saturday, May 2, 2026, and will offer gift cards and tote bags to early customers. The store is expected to create 6-10 new jobs and contribute to the community through tax revenue and support for literacy initiatives via the Dollar General Literacy Foundation.

feed.title: AIG supercharges profit as underwriting income more than triples in Q1
feed.summary: American International Group (AIG) reported strong first-quarter 2026 results, with net income attributable to common shareholders increasing to $763 million and adjusted after-tax income per diluted share rising 80% year-over-year. The company's General Insurance segment saw net premiums written grow 24% and underwriting income more than triple, driven by growth in North America Commercial, International Commercial, and Global Personal lines. AIG also improved its calendar-year combined ratio to 87.3% and continued to divest its stake in Corebridge Financial, highlighting a focus on underwriting discipline and capital returns.

feed.title: Should Fifth Third’s Texas Expansion and Branch Conversions Prompt Action From Fifth Third Bancorp (FITB) Investors?
feed.summary: Fifth Third Bancorp is embarking on a significant expansion into Texas, opening its first financial center in Frisco and planning over 250 locations by 2029, involving an investment of over $700 million and conversions of Comerica branches. This move aims to build a dense footprint in growing markets, but investors are advised to consider how this expansion balances against current pressures like slower commercial loan demand and fintech competition. The strategic push is occurring after a Q1 2026 earnings report showing $1,934 million in net interest income and $165 million in net income, highlighting the tension between near-term earnings and long-term growth potential.

feed.title: Is Surging AI Connectivity Demand From Amazon and Anthropic Altering The Investment Case For Astera Labs (ALAB)?
feed.summary: Astera Labs (ALAB) is experiencing significant revenue growth in its AI data center connectivity business, driven by demand from hyperscalers like Amazon and the Amazon–Anthropic partnership. While the company's reliance on a few powerful customers presents a risk, the ratification of UALink 2.0 specifications supports broader adoption of its connectivity solutions. Astera Labs' projections indicate substantial revenue and earnings growth with a fair value of $204.47, suggesting a 5% upside from its current price, though some analysts are less optimistic due to potential in-house or rival solutions from hyperscalers.

feed.title: Investors sue Apollo, CEO Rowan over alleged Epstein cover-up
feed.summary: Apollo Global Management and CEO Marc Rowan are being sued in a securities class action for allegedly hiding extensive business ties with Jeffrey Epstein. The lawsuit, filed on behalf of investors, claims Apollo repeatedly denied any business with Epstein, despite new evidence from DOJ files indicating deep involvement, including Epstein receiving internal financial documents and participating in significant firm discussions. The complaint suggests these alleged misrepresentations caused a decline in Apollo's stock price.

feed.title: Wave Life Sciences (Nasdaq: WVE) details 2025 milestones, cash and executive pay
feed.summary: Wave Life Sciences (WVE) filed an amendment to its 10-K report, providing detailed information on its directors, executive officers, corporate governance, and executive compensation for 2025. The company highlighted significant business milestones, including progress in obesity and Duchenne muscular dystrophy programs, a major collaboration with GSK, and a successful $402.5 million equity financing that resulted in $602.1 million in cash and cash equivalents by year-end 2025. Executive compensation, supported by over 99% shareholder approval, includes performance-based cash bonuses, multi-year option, and RSU grants, aligning executive interests with long-term shareholder value creation.

feed.title: Watts Water (NYSE: WTS) family group reports large holdings, voting trust to 2030
feed.summary: A Schedule 13G/A filing reveals that a family group, including Timothy P. Horne, other Horne siblings, and Walter J. Flowers, maintains significant beneficial ownership in Watts Water Technologies (NYSE: WTS). Timothy P. Horne alone holds 17.7% equity and 68.1% voting power due to a 1997 Voting Trust. This trust, which grants the trustee sole voting power and was extended to expire on August 26, 2030, aggregates much of the family's Class B Common Stock, which is convertible into Class A Common Stock on a one-for-one basis.

The company's AUM increased to $18.3 billion, and its ETF suite surpassed $315 million. Key highlights include the successful closing of Westwood Energy Secondaries Fund 2 and the onboarding of its first institutional managed investment solutions client, validating new distribution capabilities and supporting future growth.

feed.title: XWELL (Nasdaq: XWEL) amends 10-K for Part III, pay and ownership
feed.summary: XWELL (Nasdaq: XWEL) has filed an amended Annual Report on Form 10-K/A to include previously omitted Part III information concerning directors, executive compensation, and ownership details. This amendment was necessary because the company will not file a definitive proxy statement within 120 days of its 2025 fiscal year end. It also updates Sarbanes-Oxley certifications and provides insights into executive salaries, equity awards, and the composition of its independent board committees.

feed.title: [8-K] Weave Communications, Inc. Reports Material Event
feed.summary: Weave Communications, Inc. (NYSE: WEAV) reported strong financial results for Q1 2026, with revenue growing 17.4% year-over-year to $65.5 million and achieving non-GAAP net income of $2.8 million. The company also provided optimistic guidance for Q2 and the full year 2026, projecting continued revenue growth and non-GAAP operating income. Weave emphasized the increasing adoption of its AI tools by customers and announced plans for an omnichannel AI receptionist, further integrating AI into its healthcare practice platform.

feed.title: Westwood Holdings Posts Q1 2026 Results, Raises Dividend
feed.summary: Westwood Holdings Group (WHG) reported robust Q1 2026 results, with assets under management and advisement rising to $18.3 billion, driven by strength in energy strategies, ETF growth, and a successful close for its Secondaries Fund II. Despite a sequential dip in revenue, year-over-year earnings improved, the company maintained a debt-free balance sheet, and its board approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.15 per common share. TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rated WHG as "Outperform," citing improved profitability and a strong balance sheet balanced against volatile earnings and net outflows.

feed.title: Full Transcript: Westwood Holdings Gr Q1 2026 Earnings Call
feed.summary: Westwood Holdings Group (NYSE: WHG) reported a Q1 2026 AUM increase to $18.3 billion, driven by energy and real asset strategies, with total revenues of $25 million and a net income of $0.8 million. The company achieved significant milestones including its ETF suite surpassing $315 million and closing the Westwood Energy Secondaries Fund 2 with over $300 million in commitments. Management is optimistic about future growth, focusing on expanding its ETF platform and private capital strategies, and strengthening institutional and intermediary channels, while also noting the sale of Vista bank for a $2 million gain.

feed.title: [DFAN14A] WEX Inc. SEC Filing
feed.summary: This SEC filing ([DFAN14A]) from WEX Inc. indicates that Impactive Capital Master Fund LP and other affiliated entities have filed a definitive proxy statement to solicit votes for their director nominees at WEX's 2026 annual meeting of stockholders. Impactive Capital sent a letter to stockholders and posted material to their website, www.WakeUpWEX.com, on April 30, 2026, outlining their solicitation efforts. The filing is categorized as "Definitive Additional Materials" and names several individuals and entities associated with Impactive Capital as filers.
